creator: nokubi@ff.iij4u.or.jp
text:
Original mh-6.8.4-JP-3.03 distribution has some useful japanese documentations
in it. Please include them into package.

Fix: 

All documentations under doc-JP/ will be appreciated.
It would be enough to include COMMANDS.JP, FAQ.JP, FEATURES.JP, OPTIONS.JP, TODO.JP.
